title: gladiolus oligophlebius
intro: Gladiolus oligophlebius, also known as the small-flowered gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and fever. The health benefits of Gladiolus oligophlebius include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help to soothe respiratory issues and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus oligophlebius include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
